tags.description:
Big River Park Boat Ramp
Public concrete boat ramp in Big River Park providing access to the Colorado River, with nearby parking and picnic areas.
tags.name: Big River Boat Ramp

tags.description: Generally the furthest downstream takeout point for Grand Canyon boat trips. Launching here by the general public is not allowed, but those coming from upstream may continue downriver. Beware class 6 Pearce Ferry Rapid 0.5 miles downstream.
tags.name: Pearce Ferry Take-Out
